title: VO2max Ladder (Wattbike Style)
description: Progressive intensity across all aerobic zones
purpose: Progressive intensity across all aerobic zones

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 12:21 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 12:21. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 12:21 at 70%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/9. 12:21 at 80%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 12:21 at 80%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 80% for 12:21. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/9. 12:21 at 80%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 12:21 at 80%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/9. 2:36 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:36. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:36. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/9. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/9. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 100% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/9. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/9. 55-55% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:36 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 56% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/9. Power: 55-55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/9. 39 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/9. 7:09 at 110%. Cadence: 85-100 rpm. Seated. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 39 minutes in. 110% FTP, 85-100 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 71% done. 3 intervals left. 16 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6 of 9. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% done. 3 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6/9. 46 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 3 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6. 3 to go. 16 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 reps left. 11 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% through session. Rep 7/9. You've done 37min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 37 minutes of hard work. You can do 2 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% complete. Rep 7/9. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 85-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 83% done. 1 intervals left. 8 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 8 of 9. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 54 minutes of work done. 8 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 2:36 at 120%. Empty the tank. You've got 5 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 2:36 at 120%. Then 5min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 2:36 at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 2:36 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 59 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 91% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 5:51. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
